title: SseFrameTooLarge error omits the size limit
description: The error message for SseFrameTooLarge is "SSE frame too large" with no indication of what the limit is. The actual limit is 1 MiB (1024*1024 bytes), documented only in the subscribe_events doc comment and the inline guard comment in client.rs. A user who sees this error at 2am cannot tell what server behavior caused it or whether to file a bug. The error message should include the limit: "SSE frame too large (limit: 1 MiB)" so the error is actionable without reading source.
